title: BMW Boat Pack
description: Replaces the boat with BMW M3 E30
body:
All the boats _[except for the raft and chest boats]_ are now the good old BMW M3 E30.

This resource pack requires Optifine / Entity Model Features.

![[Oak Boat]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/077165e240c9f2bf3e6fbabdf1830ae29d52d331.png)
